name: ReactBits MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing access to ReactBits — a curated collection of animated React UI components, effects, and design patterns. Enables AI coding agents to query ReactBits component documentation, retrieve component code snippets, and discover available animation and UI patterns — supporting AI-assisted React frontend development.
use_cases: Querying ReactBits component documentation from React coding agents
Retrieving animated UI component implementations from frontend development agents
Discovering available React animation patterns from UI design agents
Integrating ReactBits component library into AI-assisted React development workflows
not_for: Teams using other UI libraries (shadcn, MUI, Chakra) without ReactBits
best_when: A React developer wants AI agents to quickly find and implement ReactBits animated UI components — accessing component code and documentation during AI-assisted frontend development.
avoid_when: You don't use ReactBits component library. Community tool — not official ReactBits integration.

auth.notes: No authentication — queries public ReactBits documentation and component data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — ReactBits is free, MCP is free

known_agent_gotchas: ReactBits component library evolves — verify component availability in current ReactBits version
Community MCP (ceorkm) — not official ReactBits integration
Agents may need to adapt retrieved component code to specific project's styling/dependencies
Animation components may have peer dependency requirements not captured in documentation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Read-only documentation queries. No credentials. Public component data. Low security risk.

security_score_components.security_notes: Read-only public data. No credentials. Low risk.
